_README: Approved MCP servers the court may use. Each is OFF until you set enabled=true and have its launcher installed (npx needs Node; uvx needs uv/Python). The bridge speaks stdio JSON-RPC. Nothing launches while enabled=false. Candidates below are well-known reference servers; add your own (e.g. a finance, search, or art server) the same way.

servers.name: filesystem
servers.note: Read/write files under knowledge/ — gives agents real file tools.

servers.name: fetch
servers.note: Fetch and read web pages as markdown.

servers.name: memory
servers.note: A persistent knowledge-graph memory the court can query.
